name: SunWay Biotech Co., LTD.
summary: SunWay Biotech Co., LTD. focuses on professional research and development, and technical material manufacturing and processing business. The company researches, designs, and manufactures Monascus purpureus NTU 568; Lactobacillus paracasei subsp. paracasei NTU 101; and related products. It offers dietary supplements, fermented milk and soy-milk, and formula additives in form of capsules, powder sachets, liquid, and tablets. SunWay Biotech Co., LTD. was founded in 2007 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
